accepted.reason: Classic arithmetic loops (multiples/Fibonacci/sum-square difference) are high-signal optimization kernels.
Hamming-distance and adapter-position scans are concise sequence-processing kernels.
Reflected SDE path simulation with likelihood-ratio weights is a strong stochastic numeric kernel.
MCTS node expansion/selection/backprop flow is valuable agentic search logic for optimization training.
ERP dynamic-programming distance over trajectories is a practical time-series alignment kernel.
Gridworld transition dynamics and terminal checks provide compact simulation-environment control logic.
Max-pooling forward kernels are standard deep-learning tensor loops with clear optimization paths.
Vector-normalization and Rodrigues-style rotation matrix construction is a solid geometric numeric kernel.

skipped.reason: Hardware-topology/NVML wrapper code is integration-heavy and not a portable standalone compute target.
Large image-pipeline and IO-heavy hierarchy module has broad external coupling and low standalone conversion clarity.
